prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small blue metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_3: small blue rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small green metal sphere
  - obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
  - obj_6: small red rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: small brown rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0001] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0002] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0003] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0004] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0005] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0006] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0007] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0008] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0009] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0010] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0011] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0012] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0013] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0014] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0015] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0016] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0017] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0018] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0019] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0020] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_1 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D scene and compare distances between objects.

Let me identify the objects from the image description:
- obj_0: small blue metal cylinder
- obj_1: large yellow metal cylinder
- obj_2: small cyan rubber cylinder
- obj_3: small blue rubber sphere
- obj_4: small green metal sphere
- obj_5: small yellow rubber cylinder
- obj_6: small red rubber cylinder
- obj_7: small brown rubber sphere
- obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder

Looking at the last image (which appears to be the clearest view), I need to estimate 3D positions:

- obj_8 (cyan metal cylinder): front-left area
- obj_2 (cyan rubber cylinder): left-center area
- obj_3 (blue rubber sphere): behind, upper area
- obj_4 (green metal sphere): center
- obj_7 (brown rubber sphere): center-right
- obj_5 (yellow rubber cylinder): front-center
- obj_6 (red rubber cylinder): right area
- obj_1 (large yellow metal cylinder): right-back area
- obj_0 (blue metal cylinder): right-center area

Distance obj_0 to obj_1: obj_0 is in front-right, obj_1 is back-right. Moderate distance (~2-3 units).

Now comparing each pair:
- obj_2 to obj_3: cyan rubber to blue sphere (behind) - moderate distance
- obj_2 to obj_4: cyan rubber to green sphere - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_5: cyan rubber to yellow cylinder - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_6: cyan rubber to red cylinder - small distance
- obj_2 to obj_7: cyan rubber to brown sphere - small-moderate
- obj_2 to obj_8: cyan rubber to cyan metal - small distance
- obj_3 to obj_4: blue sphere to green sphere - small
- obj_3 to obj_5: blue sphere to yellow cylinder - large
- obj_3 to obj_6: blue sphere to red cylinder - moderate-large
- obj_3 to obj_7: blue sphere to brown sphere - moderate
- obj_3 to obj_8: blue sphere to cyan metal - large
- obj_4 to obj_5: green to yellow - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_6: green to red - moderate
- obj_4 to obj_7: green to brown - small
- obj_4 to obj_8: green to cyan metal - moderate
- obj_5 to obj_6: yellow to red - moderate-large
- obj_5 to obj_7: yellow to brown - moderate
- obj_5 to obj_8: yellow to cyan metal - small
- obj_6 to obj_8: red to cyan metal - moderate
- obj_7 to obj_8: brown to cyan metal - small-moderate

obj_0 to obj_1 distance: approximately 2-3 units (moderate-large)
